introSection: Papa Wutz' Achterbahn (English: Daddy Pig's Roller Coaster) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Peppa Pig Park Günzburg in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany.
fullText: Papa Wutz' Achterbahn (English: Daddy Pig's Roller Coaster) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Peppa Pig Park Günzburg in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany.
